message:
test(P2.14): parallel test runner isolation — spawn-storm + equivalence checks

Adds 4 meta-tests validating hermetic test infrastructure:
- 16-thread spawn-storm: all use distinct HOMEs, each pending store
  has exactly 1 entry (no cross-contamination)
- Sequential vs parallel equivalence: 8 runs each, identical exit codes
- Real HOME not touched: mtime of pending dir unchanged after test
- Mixed-protocol storm: 8 Codex + 8 Claude in parallel, all 16 HOMEs
  distinct, correct protocol shapes preserved under contention

All 54 integration tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
